120363428134771890@g.us.text: Can we get a wheelchair for Thursday July 23?

Hello! @91070671138949 Yes, absolutely. 😊 

We will have a wheelchair ready for you on Thursday, July 23rd.

 Please let us know if you need anything else to make your stay comfortable!

120363407384623871@g.us.text:
Good morning Coze team😊
Quick question, how do we dispose of cardboard materials?
Please place the cardboard materials next to the outdoor trash bins. Our team will take care of them. Thank you! 😊

Hello 😊 @188584162275518 

Your airport transportation for tomorrow’s 4:30 a.m. departure has been fully arranged, and the driver has already been assigned. The driver will also assist you with moving and loading your luggage into the vehicle.

As your departure is very early, we hope you can get some comfortable rest as early as possible this evening.

Please also note that the building is mostly residential, and the neighbors will still be sleeping at that time. We would greatly appreciate it if you could prepare and leave as quietly and carefully as possible. 🙏

Thank you so much for your understanding and kind cooperation.

Cyrus
Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

hello

Hello! 🇰🇷 @YABU YUTARO

I’m here to help make your arrival smooth and comfortable, and to guide you through anything you may need for your check-in. 🏠✨

COZE Hospitality 3.0
please message me your estimated arrival time. I’ll need to know your arrival time so I can wait for you in front of the accommodation and assist you with check-in.
[JA] こちらにサービスの指示を共有いたします！
서울시 용산구 두텁바위로 97-1

Home Address :

[JA] メインゲートのピン 0 2 1 8 *
（居住者の安全のために、メインゲートがしっかり閉まっていることを再度ご確認いただけますか 🙏）

The access code of Main Door / Aeries Garden(4F) /  Wellness Club ARA(1F)
2 6 0 7 2 0 *

The neighborhood information (with Naver Map Link)
Please sign up Naver, and download Navermap app, and save our list in the app! very useful insight you will have to understand your neighborhood very quickly.
https://naver.me/IFghzbC8

🏡 COZE HT — TEVA I Urban Retreat in Yongsan HBC


(HTA Suite · HTB Suite · Wellness Club ARA · Rooftop AERIES Garden)


Welcome to your private wellness sanctuary at the foot of Namsan! All four floors of COZE HT are yours to enjoy—from Finnish sauna and jacuzzi to a leafy roof deck with skyline views. Please read this guide carefully so everything runs smoothly and neighbour‑friendly. Enjoy your stay! ✨

📌 Essential Information


Address — 97‑1 Duteopbawi‑ro, Yongsan‑gu, Seoul 04336

Main Entrance Code — 0 2 1 8 * → Always check that it relocks after every in/out

Your Suite Door Code(HOME & GARDEN & ARA) — Check‑in date in the format YYMMDD + *

Example: 10 May 2025 → 250510* (remains the same throughout your stay)

Wi‑Fi Networks

1F ARA — SSID COZE_ARA / PIN joyjoyjoy
2F HTA — SSID KT_WiFi_5G_F3E6 / PIN fdfd1cc847
3F HTB — SSID KT_WiFi_5G_F3EB / PIN 0efd1cc848
4F AERIES Garden — SSID iptime_ring / no password

👶📡 Baby Monitor Available

Keep an eye on little ones or pets on another floor in real time.
📍 Where to find it
Baby-amenities cabinet (camera + monitor set)

🔌 Quick Start
Camera — plug in the USB power (DC 5 V) cable and leave it on.

Monitor — fully charge via USB-C, then use cord-free.

Hold the power button to pair; once connected, you’re ready to go.

🌿 Wellness Club ARA — Read Me First (1 F)

⚠️ Guests are responsible for safe usage


🔥 Finnish Sauna

How to Operate

With the guest smartphone

1. Open the Diooist app.
2. Tap Power ON.
3. Tap the control button at bottom-right.
4. Set Target Temperature & Run Time.

Kids 60 °C · Adults 80 °C

On the control panel inside ARA

1. Press Power ON.
2. Tap Settings top-right.
3. Enter temperature & run time under Target.

Pre-heat at least 1 hour (80–90 °C)
Sit or lie on a towel; wipe sweat with a spare
Hydrate before and after each round—no alcohol or heavy meals
Stay ≤ 15 min per round; cool down 5–10 min between entries
Add only small ladles of water to stones; excess can damage the heater
Children only with adults, 60–70 °C, ≤ 5 min
Never sleep inside; leave the door unlatched for safety
Whisper only after 20:00, then switch the heater OFF and leave the door ajar to dry


🛀 Jacuzzi

Shower first to keep water clean.
Max 2 adults (or 3 kids)
Quiet hours begin 20:00; voices low, no music.
Limit each soak to ~20 min; rest between sessions.
No lotions, oils
Supervise children and seniors; keep water ≤ 38 °C for them.
Skip use if pregnant, on drowsy meds, or with heart issues.


🏋️ Smith Gym

Warm-up & stretch at least 5 min.
Wear clean athletic shoes—no sandals or bare feet.
Wipe all equipment with sanitizer after use.
Spotter needed for bench/overhead lifts > 40 kg.
Rack weights immediately; floor clear at all times.
Heavy free-weight zone: use with two people( guidance)
Hydrate frequently—water dispenser is in the lounge.
Kids under 16 must stay within arm’s reach.
No workouts after alcohol or straight from sauna/jacuzzi.
Report damage or odd noises via messenger; stop using that gear


🛋️ Social Lounge & Motion Beds

Daytime: bright family hang-out.
Night: sofa converts to two motion beds via remote
Extra mattresses/blankets in the cabinet behind the sofa
Privacy film blocks daytime view at the main door; close blackout curtain at night
Heating in ARA: no floor heating—use the provided electric radiators (dial 3 ≈ 22 °C)


🌳 AERIES Garden (4 F Rooftop)

Perfect for coffee, yoga, or sunset views of Namsan and the city

🔥 BBQ & Firepit

BBQ gear is in the deck containers beside the firepit:
Charcoal
Fire starters
Torch, gloves, tools

Firepit Info:

Extra firewood: to the left of the AERIES GARDEN entrance
Firepit fee: ₩30,000
Extra firewood: ₩20,000
Fire extinguisher is beside the pit

⚠️ Keep noise low after 8 PM
⚠️ No fireworks or uncontrolled flames

📱 Guest Smartphone Provided

A smartphone with a Korean number and unlimited data & calls is provided free of charge during your stay! 

Use it to: 

🍽️ order food 
🚕 call taxis 
🌐 browse the web 
🗺️ navigate the neighborhood


Local Tip — Open the Naver Map app and check our bookmarks for: 

🍜 hidden‑gem restaurants
🏪 convenience stores 
🏥 clinics 
💳 ATMs. 

It’s like having a local guide in your pocket 📍😉

🍽️ Food Delivery Made Easy

On the guest phone, open Coupang Eats.
Add items to your cart.
Screenshot the cart and send it to us via WhatsApp.
We’ll place the order on our card; pay us later in cash or crypto at checkout.

🚐 Need an MPV Van Taxi?

Seats up to 7 passengers; fares ≈ 30 % higher than regular cabs.
Let us know early if you need multiple vans or have heavy luggage.

🍳 Kitchen & Appliances

A full kitchen includes: dishwasher, oven, water purifier.

💧 Water Purifier (EVERPURE)
Brand: EVERPURE (USA) — Starbucks official partner

Type: Direct-flow purified water system

Maintenance: Professionally serviced monthly

How to use: Use the small faucet on the left side of the sink labeled “정수기 / Purified Water.”

Benefit: Very safe, great-tasting water for drinking & cooking

Feel free to cook like home! 

☕ Capsule Coffee Time

Extra capsules are in the drawer under the coffee machine — help yourself!

illy Coffee Machine Guides

Quick Start ▶ https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G
Steam Milk ▶ https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo
Volume Settings ▶ https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz

♻️ Waste & Recycling

Two categories only: General Waste and Recycling (bins by kitchen)
Food scraps → sink disposer (run tap + foot pedal; no bones or shells)
Tie full bags and leave them inside the hallway; we handle municipal pick‑up.

🧴 Linens & Amenities

30 sets of premium towels (face · body · foot)
Sauna/shower gowns in ARA vanity room
Hotel‑quality toiletries: toothbrush, toothpaste, razor, cotton pads, etc.

💨 Ventilation & Heating

Suites: 24 / 7 heat‑exchange ventilator for fresh air without opening windows
HTA & HTB: under‑floor heating (ondol) 
— keep power ON, set ≈ 22 °C; use “Away” if floors feel too warm

ARA lounge: electric radiator only; set Dial 3 ≈ 22 °C.

🔇 Quiet Hours

Please lower voices after 20:00, especially in Wellness Club ARA and on the rooftop.

🚭 Smoking

Strictly no indoor smoking. Use the outdoor ashtray near the entrance.

🚗 Parking

One shared pad on 1 F.
Cars may park tandem if both HTA and HTB guests have vehicles; message us if you need cars shuffled.

💬 Need Anything?

Message us anytime on WhatsApp, KakaoTalk, or LINE — we reply quickly and are happy to help!

All you need · All‑in‑one · All for you. — COZE Hospitality 3.0 ✨

🏠 Home Address
97-1, Duteopbawi-ro, Yongsan-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea 04336

🔑 Main Gate PIN
0218*

🚪 Access Code – Main Door / 1F / 2F / 3F / Aeries Garden (4F) / Wellness Club ARA (1F)
260720*

Yes, absolutely. We are all set for your airport pickup from ICN to your rental tomorrow. 

We look forward to welcoming you!

120363423605030782@g.us.text: Hi Gaya and COZE team, thanks for your hospitality. We all had an awesome stay and experience. The apartment was much more than what we had expected. Fantastic service and tour from Cyrus. Jin, Ricky with information. You all made our Seoul trip experience a whole lot better.  Clean appartments with everything we needed. Ammenities all there. Thank you all u guys again. Fantastic experience

Thank you so much for your wonderful message! 😊 It was truly a pleasure hosting you and your family.

We’re so happy to hear that you enjoyed the accommodation, our service, and your time in Seoul. Cyrus, Jin, Ricky, Gaya, and the entire COZE team sincerely appreciate your kind words.

We hope you take home many beautiful memories from Korea, and we would love to welcome you again someday.

120363409204133943@g.us.text:
Hello, this is Cyrus from the COZE Guest Care Team 😊

I just wanted to check in and make sure everything has been comfortable during your stay.

If there is anything inconvenient, anything you need help with, or if any supplies inside the accommodation are running low, please feel free to let me know.
everything has been great so far, thank you!
That’s wonderful to hear! 😊 Please feel free to message us anytime if you need anything during your stay. We’re always happy to help!

120363422965145348@g.us.text: Hello. Can we please have juice, bread, kiwi and more coffee for breakfast tomorrow.

Hello @190061194801246  The complimentary breakfast will be delivered right to your door by 7:00 AM tomorrow morning. 🥞☀️

​Please pick it up and enjoy your delicious breakfast! We truly hope you have a wonderful and bright morning! 🥰🌈

​Warmly,
Cyrus, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0 🧸🎈

All You Need. All in One. All Yours.


🇰🇷✨ Welcome to Korea! And Welcome to COZE.

Jet-lagged? Phone not working? Hungry but can’t read the menu?
We get it. And we’ve built a stay just for you.

COZE is where your trip begins with care — not confusion.
We don’t just rent homes. We curate your entire Korean experience around you.

> Think: a home in Korea, powered by local friends who do everything for you.
